crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: weekly-performance-report
crons.prompt: Generate weekly ad performance report for paying clients (Reyco Marine first, Titan if live). Pull ROAS, CPA, CTR from active campaigns. Summarize wins, losses, and recommendations. Create approval request before sending to client.

crons.name: fusion-credential-reminder
crons.prompt: Read skills/api-reporting/SKILL.md credential checklist section. Send Telegram to user (chat_id 1582763943): remind them Fusion Financial Meta campaign ends Apr 30, share the exact credentials needed (META_ACCESS_TOKEN, META_AD_ACCOUNT_ID) and two options: (1) add token to org secrets for live pull, or (2) export CSV from Meta Ads Manager. Ask which they prefer. Then notify boss that credential ask was sent.
